text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 134 

GAP_LTCP_COINS_1M 

LABEL: Gap Long Term Care Pharmacy Coinsurance for 1-month supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a 1-month supply of the drugs on 
this tier, using a long-term care pharmacy (LTCP) during the coverage gap phase of the Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: GAP_LTCP_COINS_1M 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8
